description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in modern, urban casual attire. He wears a fitted long-sleeve top and cargo-style pants with visible pocket flaps and straps, paired with high-top sneakers. His face is partially covered by a mask, and he has spiky, voluminous hair. The figure's hands are gloved, and his overall appearance suggests a contemporary, streetwise character. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a slim, athletic build. The asset is detailed with subtle folds in the fabric and accessories such as straps and gloves, enhancing its realism for urban environments.
description: A stylized adult male in urban casual wear with a mask, gloves, and spiky hair, dressed in a fitted top, cargo pants, and high-top sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the masked face, spiky hair, fitted top, gloves, and detailed cargo pants with visible pockets and straps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the spiky hair, the fit of the clothing, and the layered look of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the fit of the top, and the symmetrical placement of the pants' pockets and straps.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the mask, gloves, and the layered clothing details.
attribute_clothing_type: urban casual long-sleeve top, cargo pants with straps, gloves, and high-top athletic footwear
